overall.description: Game engine footage from the bridge of a vessel navigating through stormy coastal waters near mountainous terrain. Navigation displays including GPS, radar, and sonar are visible overhead as lightning illuminates the dark scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigating stormy coastal waters

agents.ego_description: navigating the vessel through rough seas while monitoring the navigation displays

entered.detail: navigation display showing chart plotter with coastal map and vessel position
circular radar screen with rotating sweep showing coastline returns
depth finder display showing water column and bottom profile in orange and blue
forward deck and railings of the ship visible through the bridge windows
dark mountainous terrain rising from the water on the starboard side
rough choppy waves with whitecaps in the stormy conditions

segments.scene_description: View from inside a ship's bridge looking forward over the bow as the vessel navigates through stormy coastal waters. Navigation screens display GPS, radar, and sonar data while the dark mountainous coastline looms on the right and rough seas stretch ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigating stormy coastal waters

events.description: bright lightning flash briefly illuminates the entire scene, revealing details of the coastline and waves

agents.ego_description: continuing to navigate through the storm, maintaining course along the coastline

segments.scene_description: The vessel continues through the stormy waters as a lightning flash briefly lights up the scene around 8.5 seconds. The mountainous coastline on the right becomes more prominent as the ship progresses, with navigation displays continuing to show radar and chart data.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from the bridge of a vessel as it navigates through a dark, stormy coastal environment. It begins with a view over the bow, where navigation screens displaying GPS, radar, and sonar data frame the perspective of rough seas stretching ahead. As the ship progresses, a sudden flash of lightning briefly illuminates the oppressive darkness, casting a stark light over the churning water. The scene then shifts as the vessel draws closer to the shore, causing the looming mountainous coastline on the right to become more prominent and detailed against the stormy sky.
